services.title: Portable Appliance Testing (PAT)
services.body: Comprehensive PAT testing for all types of electrical equipment.

services.title: Electrical Installation Condition Reports (EICR)
services.body: Detailed EICR reports to ensure your property is safe and compliant.

services.title: Residual Current Device (RCD) Testing
services.body: Testing RCDs to prevent electrical shocks and fires.

services.title: Fault Finding & Repairs
services.body: Identify and fix electrical faults quickly and safely.

services.title: Landlord Electrical Safety Checks
services.body: Ensure your rental properties meet legal safety standards.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Inspections
services.body: Regular inspections to maintain workplace electrical safety.

faqs.a: Yes — all our testers are NICEIC approved and fully insured.

faqs.q: Can you provide EICR reports for my business?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We issue comprehensive EICR certificates for commercial properties.

faqs.q: How do I get a quote?
